heading: Determinations of dependency
label: 1084 Determinations of dependency
text: A determination of dependency by an administering Secretary under this chapter is conclusive. However, the administering Secretary may change a determination because of new evidence or for other good cause. The Secretary’s determination may not be reviewed in any court or by the Comptroller General, unless there has been fraud or gross negligence.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)108437:404., .June 7, 1956, ch. 374, § 30470 Stat. 254The words “the General Accounting Office” are substituted for the words “any accounting officer of the Government” for clarity. The words “All” and “for all purposes” are omitted as surplusage.
